steps.title: Translate percentages into equations
steps.content:
Since $a$ is 4200% of $c$, we have $$a = \frac{4200}{100}c = 42c.$$
Because $c$ is 20% of $b$, we have $$c = \frac{20}{100}b = 0.20b,$$ which gives $$b = \frac{c}{0.20} = 5c.$$

steps.title: Find w by substituting into a-b = wc
steps.content:
Substitute the expressions for $a$ and $b$: $$a - b = 42c - 5c = 37c.$$
Since $a - b = wc$, we have $$wc = 37c$$ and, because $c\gt 0$, $$w = 37.$$
The answer is 37.
